original_title: NTRD-106 Netorareze Wife To Neighbors Of Drinking Fellows ... Yuri Honma - Really
overview: I live with my wife. About once a month, I would drink at home with friends I met at an izakaya. One day my wife said that she wanted to drink at home during the daytime on weekdays, and I was on weekdays? I thought that too, but he said it was fine. On the day of the event, I went to work, telling myself not to drink too much. I will contact you during the break time, but it will not be marked as read. A few hours later, I got a reply from my wife, but I felt a sense of incongruity with the unusual text...
